description: Triage queue for newly submitted incidents before they enter the active tracker. Promoted and dismissed items remain in this list for audit purposes. Only items with TriageStatus = 'Pending' are displayed in the Power Apps intake gallery.

columns.name: Title
columns.description: Incident title as submitted by the reporter.

columns.name: Owner
columns.description: Person who raised or is reporting the incident. Free text.

columns.name: Priority
columns.description: Initial operational priority as assessed by the submitter. Flows through to EIT_Incidents.Priority on promotion.

columns.name: Description
columns.description: Full incident description provided by the submitter. Mapped to EIT_Incidents.NextAction during promotion.

columns.name: Domain
columns.description: Enterprise domain the submitter believes this incident belongs to. Flows through to EIT_Incidents.Domain on promotion. Replaces OFR_IntakeQueue.FunctionalGroup.

columns.name: IncidentType
columns.description: Pre-triage incident classification provided by the submitter. Flows through to EIT_Incidents.IncidentType on promotion. Net-new vs OFR_IntakeQueue.

columns.name: DateSubmitted
columns.description: Date the intake item was created. Set automatically by Power Apps on form submit.

columns.name: TriageStatus
columns.description: Pending = awaiting triage review. Promoted = accepted via Power Automate Intake Promotion flow. Dismissed = rejected via Dashboard dismiss action. Accepted = accepted via Intake Review panel in Power Apps. Rejected = rejected via Intake Review panel in Power Apps.

columns.name: SubmissionSource
columns.description: How this intake item arrived. Power Apps = submitted via the EIT Submit screen. Email Forward = manually created from an email report. Manual Entry = created directly in SharePoint list view. Net-new vs OFR_IntakeQueue.

columns.name: PrivilegedAndConfidential
columns.description: Legal privilege flag optionally set by the submitter at intake if they believe the incident involves attorney-client privileged matters — for example, incidents involving OGC, external legal counsel, ongoing regulatory proceedings, or employment litigation. Flows through to EIT_Incidents.PrivilegedAndConfidential on promotion. Triage reviewer must confirm or clear the designation during review.

notes: Total: 10 columns (7 adapted from OFR_IntakeQueue, 3 net-new: IncidentType, SubmissionSource, PrivilegedAndConfidential)
FunctionalGroup from OFR is replaced by Domain with 5 enterprise domain choices
TriageStatus must have all 5 choices and default to 'Pending' — this controls visibility in the Power Apps gallery
Power Apps Patch formulas must use {Value: 'text'} syntax for all Choice columns
Domain choice values must match EIT_Incidents.Domain choices exactly
